reasoning: I cannot vote for the saffron wave — not after CAA, not when I have no papers to prove what I already know about my own family. Congress was always my father's choice, and even weak, it still means secular India to me. The Left and Congress together are not my first choice, but they are the only choice against BJP. I know my vote may not matter here in Bengal where TMC is strong, but I cannot bring myself to vote for Mamata's party either — it is all just business with her. I vote for INC because it is the furthest from the men who made me afraid.
primary_drivers: Fear of CAA implementation and lack of citizenship documents
Historical habit and family tradition of Congress voting as 'secular' option
Opposition to BJP as openly anti-Muslim threat to women like her
